title: sillyrendering
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b92ad9d06f252daf20911628ade0b4c974af0064.png)

## epilepsy warning! some of vertex positions are randomized *every* frame! 

makes your game renderer silly!

q: *what it does?*

a: adds random value to every vertex position, so everyhing will look wobbly and cursed

q: *why i should install this mod?*

a: uh... uhm... honestly, i made this mod for fun and to learn some mixin. you can use this mod to challenge your run or idk

q: *compatibility?*

a: idk, mod is in early state of development, so heres the bugger. if you find any bug, feel free to report it in mod's repo issues!
